summary: A short, essentially silent graphic promo for National Native American Heritage Month with a decorative Southwestern-style mandala motif and plain white title cards reading 'DHS WORKS TO SUPPORT TRIBAL NATIONS ACROSS THE COUNTRY' and 'DHS Celebrates National Native American Heritage Month.' Tagged audio:silent with a very low music score; it is a slogan/text-card slide promo with no music-driven spectacle or genre framing, so out of scope.
notable_text: DHS WORKS TO SUPPORT TRIBAL NATIONS ACROSS THE COUNTRY; DHS Celebrates National Native American Heritage Month
